titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien d'Abbadie 72
Missal

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

notatedMusic.desc: Musical notation throughout except and some other text passages.

msItem.title: Covenant of the Morning
msItem.incipit: ኪዳን፡ ዘነግህ፡ ዘእግዚእነ።ቅዱስ፡ እግዚአብሔር። ቅዱስ፡ ኃያል፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ዘተወልደ፡ እማርያም፡ እምቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ ተሣሃለነ፡ እግዚኦ፨ ቅ፨ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቅዱስ፨ ኃያል፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ዘተጠምቀ፡ በዮርዳኖስ፨

msItem.title: Covenant of the Evening
msItem.incipit: ኪዳን፡ ዘሰ፡ ጸጋ፡ ለእ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌክሙ፨ ሕ፡ ም፡ አእኵትዎ፡ ለአምላክነ፡ ርቱዕ፡ ይ፡ ለከ፡ ለአብ፡ ዘኢይማስን፡ መድኃኔ፡ ነፍስነ፡ ወመሰረተ፡ ጥበባት፨

msItem.title: Litany for the night
msItem.incipit: ሊጦን፡ ዘሌሊት፡ ወካዕበ፡ ናስተብቍዕ፡ በል። እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡ በኵሉ፡ ወበውስተ፡ ኵሉ፡ እስመ፡ ከደነነ፡ ረድአነ፡ ወሶቀነ፡ ወአብጽሐነ፡ እስከ፡ ዛቲ፡ ሰዓት፡

msItem.title: Litany for Tuesday
msItem.incipit: ስምከ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ትጉህ፡ ዘኢይዴቅስ፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ዘኢይደክም፡

msItem.title: Litany for Friday
msItem.incipit: ለትሩጽ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ምሕረትከ፡ ላዕሌነ፡ ወብርሃነ፡ ገጽከ፡ ላዕለ፡ ነፍስነ፡ ይምጻእ፡ ምሕረትከ፡ ዘያሐይወነ፡

msItem.title: Litany for Wednesday
msItem.incipit: ወካእበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለአምላከ፡ ምሕረት፡ ዘረዳእኮ፡ ለአብርሃም፡ አመ፡ ይቀትሎሙ፡ ለነገሥት፡ ዘአድኃንኮ፡ ለይስሐቅ፡ እምነ፡ መጥባሕት፡ ዘመራሕኮ፡ ለያዕቆብ፡ ውስተ፡ መንገድ፡

msItem.title: Litany for Thursday
msItem.incipit: ቀዳሜ፡ ጸጋ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ኃይሉ፡ ወጥበቡ፡ ለአቡሁ፨ እስመ፡ አንተ፡ ውእቱ፡ በግዑ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘያአትት፡ ኃጢአተ፡ ዓለም፡ ተሣሃለነ፨

msItem.title: Litany for Saturday
msItem.incipit: ከመ፡ ታድኅነነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ እምዕለት፡ እኪት፡ ወእምሰዓታተ፡ መንሱት፨ ወእምኵሎሙ፡ ዘእኩያን፡ ትምይንት፡ እምህየት፡ ወእምጽርዓት፡

msItem.title: Litany for Sunday
msItem.incipit: ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ለለ፩ዱ፡ ፩ዱ፡ ስእለቶ፡ ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ለለ፩ዱ፡ ፩ዱ፡ እምከርሠ፡ እሙ። ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ብዙኃነ፡ አሕዛበ፡

msItem.title: Covenant of the Night
msItem.incipit: ኪዳን፡ ዘሰርክ፨ አምላክነ፡ ዘዲበ፡ ኪሩቤል፡ ይነብር፡ እምኀበ፡ መላእክት፡ ይትአኰት፡ ወይትወደስ፡ አንተ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዘከፈልከነ፡ ንባእ፡ ውስተ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ጽርኃ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ማኅፈድከ፡ ወንዘክር፡ ቅድሳተ፡ ስብሐቲከ፡ ወንፍዲ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the living ones
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ በል፡ እግዚአ፡ ሕያዋን፡ ሕይወተ፡ ሙታን፡ ተስፋ፡ ቅቡፃን፡ ረዳኤ፡ ምንዱባን፡ ወምንጽሔ፡ ኃጥአን፡ ዘሞተ፡ አፅራዕከ፡ ወማዕሠረ፡ ሰይጣን፡ በቲከከ፡ ሕይወተ፡
msItem.note: The text breaks up close to the end.

msItem.title: Supplications Za-yǝnaggǝś of ʾabuna Yāred, for the sick
msItem.incipit: ወያንሥእ። ዘውእቱ፡ ሥሉጥ፡ ላዕለ፡ ምሕረት፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፨ ጸልዩ፡ እወ፡ እግዚኦ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፨ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ለቅዱስ፡ ወልድከ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እግዚእነ፨ አኃዊነ፡ ድዉያነ፡ ፈውስ፡ ወለእለሂ፡ አጋንንተ፡ አንጽሐ፡

msItem.title: Supplications for the dead
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ በል፡ ዘኵሉ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ አኃዊነ፨ ከመ፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ ታግዕዝ፡ ውስተ፡ መካን፡ ሥዑር፨ ወኀበ፡ ማየ፡ ዕረፍት፡ ወያኅብር፡ አንሥኦ፡ ሥጋሆሙ፡ በዘባቲ፡ ሠርዐ፡ ዕለተ፡ በዘኢይትኄሰው፡ ተስፋሁ፨

msItem.title: Supplication for the travellers
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ዘይሁብ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ባሕር፡ ወውስተ፡ ማይ፡ ኃይል፡ ምሕዋረ፡ ዘያወጽኦሙ፡ እመዛግብቲሆሙ፡ ለነፋሳት፡ በእንተ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ እለ፡ ይነግዱ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the rain
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ንስእለከ፡ ወናስተበቍዐከ፡ ከመ፡ ትፈኑ፡ ዝናመ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍና፡ ኀበ፡ ይትፈቀድ፡ አስተፍሥሕ፡ ወአርዊ፡ ትለሚሃ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the harvest
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ለዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ወመድኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፤ በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡ ከመ፡ ፍሬሃ፡ ለምድር፡ ያልህቅ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for water of the rivers
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ በል፡ በእንተ፡ ማያተ፡ አፍላግ፡ ከመ፡ ያዕርግ፡ እስከ፡ መስፈርቶሙ፤ እስመ፡ አንተ፡ ዘትገብር፡ ሠናያተ፤ ወታርኁ፡ ክረምተ፡ ወትፌኑ፡ ዝናማተ፤ አስተፍሥሕ፡ ገጻ፡ ለምድር፡ አብጽሕ፡

msItem.title: Supplication of the king
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ናስተበቍዖ፡ በል፨ እግዚኦሙ፡ ለአጋዕዝት፡ ወንጉሦሙ፡ ለነገሥት፡ በእንተ፡ መንግሥተ፡ ገብርከ፡ መፍቀሬ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡፨ ንጉሥነ፡ እግሌ፨ ከመ፡ መንግሥቶ፡ ይዕቀብ፡ በጽድቅ፡ ወበሰላም፨ መዋኢ፡ በኵሉ፡ ፀብዕ፨

msItem.title: Supplication for peace
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ በል፡ በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡ ለቅድስት፡ አሐቲ፡ እንተ፡ በኵለሄ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ከመ፡ ብዙኃ፡ ሰላመ፡ ይ፡ ጸጉ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ኖሎት፨ ወአሕዛብ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወሀቤ፡ ሰላም፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፨

msItem.title: Prayer of Incense of the Morning, of Egypt
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን፡ ዘነግ። ይብል፡ ካህን፡ እንዘ፡ ያዓርግ፡ ዕጣነ፡ ቡሩክ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ወቡሩክ፡ ወልድ፡ ዋሕድ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እግዜነ፡ ዘተሰብእአ፡ ማርያም፡ እምቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ ወቡሩክ፡ መንፈስ፡
ቅዱስ፡ ጰራቅሊጦስ፡ አሜን፨ ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፡ ዘተወከፍከ፡ ቍርባነ፡ አቤል፡ ጻድቅ፡ ወመሥዋዕተ፡ ኖኅ፡ ወአብርሃም፨ ወዕጣነ፡ አሮን፡ ወዘካርያስ፡ ከማሁ፡ ተወከፍ፡ ኀቤከ፡ ዘንተ፡ ዕጣነ፡
msItem.explicit: ወለእለ፡ አትኃቱ፡ አርእስቲሆሙ፡ ቅድሜከ፡ አልዕሎሙ፡ በምሕረትከ፡ ወአሰርግዎሙ፡ በሠናያቲከ፨ ወለይድልወነ፡ ለኵለነ፡ ርስተ፡ መንግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ በሥምረተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አቡከ፡ መሐሪ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ማሕያዊ፡ ዘዕሩይ፡ ምስሌከ፡ ይእዜኒ፡ ወዘልፈኒ፡ ወእዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨ ፨

msItem.title: Prayer of Incense of the Evening, of Egypt
msItem.incipit: ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን፡ ዘሰርክ፡ ዘግብጽ፡ ወይብለ፡ በከመ፡ ነግህ፨ ወሶበ፡ ፈጸመ፡ ይበውእ፡ ኀበ፡ ታቦት፡ ወያዓርግ፡ ዕጣነ፡ ወይብል፨ ክርስቶስ፡ አምላክነ፡ ዓቢይ፡ መፍርህ፡ ዘበአማን፡ ወልድ፡ ዋሕድ፡ ቃለ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ዕፍረት፡ ዘተሰውጠ፡ ውእቱ፡ ስምክ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወበውእቱ፡ መካን፡ ያቄርቡ፡ ዕጣነ፨

msItem.title: Common of the Office
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልደ፡ዝንቱ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዘይደሉ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡ መቅደመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ይጼሊ፡ ቀሲስ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ንሥሐ፡ ጊዜ፡ ይበውእ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ወእምድኅረዝ፡ ይበል፡ ዘንተ፨ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፡ አንተ፡ ውእቱ፡ በሕቲተከ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወወሀብከነ፡ ለኵልነ ቅድሳተ፡ በኃይልከ፨ ዘኢይያስተርኢ፡ እው፡ አግዚኦ፡ ንሰእለከ፡
msItem.explicit: ናስተበቍዖ፡ ከመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ከመቦሙ፡ ጽሒቀ፡ ወያስተሐምሞ፡ ወይሚጥ፡ እምኔኖሙ፡ ማእሰረ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ዓለም፡ ወየሀቦሙ፡ ፍቅረ፡ ወግዕዘ፡ ወተስፋ፡ ሠናየ፡ በእንተ፡ ሥጋሁ፡ ወደሙ፡ ለወልደ እግዚአብሔር፡ በእንተ፡ ማርያም፡ በእንተ፡ መስቀል፡ ዓራተ፡ ሕማሙ፡ ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን፨
msItem.colophon: ተወጥነ፡ ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ አመ፡ ፮፡ ለመጋቢት፡ ወተፈጸመት፡ አመ፱፡ ለግንቦት፡ በ፯፡ ጽልመት፡ ጊዜ፡ ፱፡ ሰዓት፡ በ፳፪፡ አበቅቴ፡ ወ፰፡ መጥቅዕ፡ በ፸፻፡ ወ፩፻፹ወ፭፡ ዓመተ፡ ዓለም፡ በ፲፩፡ ዘመነ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ለኢያሱ፡ The date of completion mentioned here is 9 Gǝnbot of the year 7185 from the Creation of the World (= 14 May 1693 CE), which fits the indication 11th year of the reign of ʾIyāsu (I). The copying is mentioned to have started on 6 Maggābit (= 12 March 1693 CE).

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by John, son of Thunder (same as LIT1570habeka)
Anaphora of Mary by St Cyriacus of Behnesa
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Jacob of Serug (same as LIT2404Tanseu)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by John Chrysostom (same as LIT3120Anapho)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Epiphanius of Cyprus (same as LIT1347Epipha)
Anaphora of St Gregory of Nyssa
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Athanasius (same as LIT1162Athana)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Basil (same as LIT1098Anapho)
The Second Anaphora of St Gregory
msItem.note: Added possibly slightly later, in Hand 2.

list.item:
8
s.l.: 2, stub after 7 s.l.: 7, stub after 2

supportDesc.condition: The leather cover is partly missing. A portion of the text is erased on

layout.note: The leaves are neither pricked nor ruled.

handNote.desc: Careful, regular; by a good scribe. Possibly more than one scribe took part in copying.

handNote.seg: Second half of the 17th century/early 18th century.
handNote.desc: Careful, somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe. The script is of smaller size, especially the one used for additional notes.

item.desc: Scribal note on commencing the writing
item.q: ወተወጥነ፡ ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ አመ፡ ፮፡ ለመጋቢት፡ በዕለተ፡ ሐሙስ፡ በ፪፡ ሠርቀ፡ ሌሊት፡

item.desc: ʾAkkʷateta qʷǝrbān za-ḥawāryātAn excerpt from the Anaphora of the Apostles (‘Laying of hands’)
item.q: አንብሮ፡ እድ፡ ዘቅዳሴ፡ ሐዋርያት፨ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘለዓለም፡ ብርሃነ፡ ሕይወት፡ ዘኢይጠፍ፡

item.desc: A genealogy preceded by a pen trial
item.q: ፈቲነ፡ ብርዕ፡ በዕለተ፡ ገድና፡ ማርያም፡ ዳንኤል፡ ተስፋይ፡ ተክለ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ተስፎም፡ አስገደ፡ ጓል፡ ቃይሕ፡ ሹም፡ ደራ፡ ካልባይ፡ ስንአፈ፡ አዕዋተ፡ ሮምዘመዳ፡ ተወልደት፡ ቃውሎስ፡

item.desc: A short genealogy of Christ, the line of St Mary
A directive prescribing what to do with tabot defiled by qalāṭi ('a reckless one'?)
item.q: ሶበ፡ ለከፎ፡ ቀላጢ ለታቦት፡ ዘኢመፍትው፡ በምንተኒ፡ ከመዝ፡ ግበር፡ እንበለ፡ ያእምሩ፡ ሕዝብ። መቅደመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ያዕርግ፡ ያዕጣነ፡ ወይድግም፡ ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን፡ ጸዊሮ፡ ታቦተ፤

item.desc: A directive prescribing which texts should be read daily in the church
An ownership note mentions the donor Walatta Ṗeṭros and her brother Walda Giyorgis, both said to be children of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl (descendants of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl?)
item.q: ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘቅድስት፡ መግደላዊት፡ ዘዓራቶ፡ ዘወሀበታ፡ ወለተ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ እኅቱ፡ ለአቤቶ፡ ወልደ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ወአቡሆሙ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፡ ከመ፡ ይኩኖሙ፡ መድኃኒተ፡ ነፍሶሙ፨

item.desc: An unidentified text, possibly a directive, composed in part from quotations. Numerous lacunas are meant possibly for the rubricated name of St Mary
item.q: ተዓብዮ፡ ነፍስየ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ በል፡ ፫ጊዜ፡ ንዒ፡ ዘትነብሪ፡ በአርያም፡ ወንዒ፡፨

item.desc: An ownership note mentioning Walda Mikāʾel. The name of the scribe, Fantā, in the last line has been written in a different hand, which otherwise doesn't seem to have been attested in the manuscript
item.q: ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘአባ፡ ወልደ፡ ሚካኤል፡ ዘሰረቆ፡ ወዘፈሐቆ፡ በልሳነ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ወጳውሎስ፡ ውጉዝ፡ ለይኩን፨ ወለጸሐፊሐ፡ ፈንታ፡

item.desc: Shelfmark of the Library on the spine and the inner side of the front board
Several notes, some being incipits of texts, some being writing exercises or pen trials, written in various hands.
Shelfmark and stamp of the Library
Cues for rubricator, on these and some other folia
Corrections made in various hands, by various means including tamallas-sign
An unclear note in the upper margin
Pen trial, unclear note written upside down

binding.decoNote: According to A. d'Abbadie, the manuscript has an old leather case.

history.origin: 1693 or somewhat later. According to the dates provided in , at least the part of the manuscript up to or possibly the entire manuscript might have been completed on 14 May 1693 CE. Additional note 8 mentions Walatta Ṗeṭros as the one who donated to book to the church of Mary Magdalene of ʿArāto (but cp. and elsewhere obviously the names were written over other names which were erased). Additional note 10 mentions as an owner Walda Mikāʾel.
history.provenance: The manuscript was aquired by Antoine d'Abbadie sometime between 1840 and 1848.
history.acquisition: The manuscript entered the Bibliothèque nationale de France in 1902.

bibl.title: Notice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’Abbadie
Extrait du Journal Asiatique
Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection Antoine d’Abbadie
Catalogue raisonné de manuscrits éthiopiens appartenant à Antoine d’Abbadie

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created the record on the basis of the available images.
